report.summary: Built 2 learn guides: Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols (LayerZero V2, Wormhole NTT, Hyperlane, CCIP comparison) and Fully Onchain Gaming & Autonomous Worlds (MUD, Dojo, World Engine frameworks). Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Cross-chain messaging is a $225B+ value-transfer infrastructure layer. LayerZero V2 dominates with 75% market share (159M+ messages, 168 chains, DVN security stack). Wormhole innovating with NTT (no liquidity pools) and ZK proof verification. Hyperlane is the only permissionless protocol (150+ chains, ISM customizable security). Chainlink CCIP targets enterprise/institutional via SWIFT integration (11,000+ banks).

Fully onchain gaming (FOCG) stores both state AND logic on-chain via smart contracts. Three competing frameworks: MUD (Lattice, EVM, ECS architecture), Dojo (Starknet, Cairo, ZK provable), World Engine (Argus Labs, sharded rollups, 1000+ TPS, sub-100ms blocks). Market projected at $65B by 2027. CCP Games committed $40M to EVE Frontier (late 2026 launch).
Key trend: cross-chain consolidation expected — Delphi Digital predicts 60% of interop protocols will vanish by 2027 as market consolidates around ERC-7683 and IEEE 3221.01-2025 standards.
Key trend: onchain gaming shifting from 'play-to-earn' to 'autonomous worlds' — persistent, permissionless environments anyone can build on top of.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols Guide 2026 (~868 lines, ~3000 words) — covers LayerZero V2 (DVN, OFT, Stargate), Wormhole NTT (burn/mint, ZK proofs, Guardian network), Hyperlane (permissionless ISMs, WBTC bridge), Chainlink CCIP (RMN, SWIFT). Includes head-to-head comparison table, decision framework, 6 FAQs.

Fully Onchain Gaming & Autonomous Worlds Guide 2026 (~523 lines, ~2800 words) — covers MUD (ECS architecture, EVM), Dojo (Cairo/Starknet, provable), World Engine (sharded rollups, Cardinal). Top games: Dark Forest, Primodium, Eternum, Dark Frontier, EVE Frontier. Framework comparison table, challenges analysis, 6 FAQs.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Cross-Chain Guide — Title: 'Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols Guide 2026 — LayerZero, Wormhole, Hyperlane & CCIP | degen0x' | Target keywords: cross-chain messaging, LayerZero, Wormhole NTT, Hyperlane, CCIP, omnichain | Schemas: ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 FAQs) | Internal links: cross-chain-bridges-guide, chain-abstraction-guide-2026, erc-7683-cross-chain-intents-guide, bridge-aggregator

Gaming Guide — Title: 'Fully Onchain Gaming & Autonomous Worlds Guide 2026 | degen0x' | Target keywords: onchain gaming, autonomous worlds, MUD framework, Dojo, World Engine, blockchain games | Schemas: ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 FAQs) | Internal links: zero-knowledge-proofs, modular-blockchains-guide, account-abstraction, gas-tracker, ai-crypto-agents-guide
Both pages include OpenGraph article metadata, Twitter cards, Breadcrumb navigation, and were added directly to PUBLISHED_PAGES (batch 5 for March 25, 2026)
